creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
This PR seems to be a duplicate of ports/150549 -- the problem was
fixed, and that PR was closed, on 27 Sept. 2010.  So this PR can
probably be closed, too.  If the submitter is building lapack with the
non-default option WITH_PROFILE=yes, he should install the necessary
base system profiling libraries, either by building the base system
from source WITH_PROFILE=yes (the default) or installing the
supplementary proflibs binary distribution using sysinstall(8) or
freebsd-update(8).

Regards,
                b.
